Edge Cases

Empty Elements

Before empty div:

After empty div (should be adjacent with no gap).

Hidden zero-height content

After zero-height div.

Long Unbreakable Word

supercalifragilisticexpialidocious-pneumonoultramicroscopicsilicovolcanoconiosis

Normal text continues here after the long word container.

Level 1
Level 2
Level 3
Level 4

Overlapping Positioned Elements

Back layer
Front layer

Font Size Extremes

This text is 6px — very small and may be hard to read.

Big text

Normal text after extremes.

White-Space Preservation

function hello(name) { console.log("Hello, " + name + "!"); return true; }

Empty Table Cells

ABC
Data
DataData
   

Special HTML Entities

Inline vs Block Display Edge Cases

Inline: Inline-block continues here.

Float: Right floatThis text wraps around the floated element on the left side of the container.
